svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="System Architecture" id="system-architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1422" dy="794" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="二脚ロボット制御システム アーキテクチャ" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="20" width="520" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Layer: High-Level Control --> <mxCell id="layer-highlevel" value="High-Level Control Layer (10-50 Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="80" width="920" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-navigation" value="Navigation Node<br>(Nav2 Integration)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#10739e;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="120" width="180" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-task-manager" value="Task Manager Node<br>(Behavior FSM)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#10739e;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="120" width="180" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-planner" value="Path Planner" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b1ddf0;strokeColor=#10739e;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="120" width="180" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="label-phase3" value="Phase 3 (Future)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="820" y="120" width="200" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow: High-Level to Gait --> <mxCell id="arrow-hl-to-gait" value="Velocity/Direction Commands" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer-highlevel" target="layer-gait"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="580" y="180" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="210" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Layer: Gait Generation --> <mxCell id="layer-gait" value="Gait Generation Layer (50-100 Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="220" width="920" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-rl-policy" value="RL Policy Node<br>(PyTorch/libtorch)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="260" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-gait-generator" value="Gait Pattern Generator<br>(CPG / Trajectory)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c3e88d;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="260" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="label-phase2" value="Phase 2" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="260" width="380" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow: Gait to Control --> <mxCell id="arrow-gait-to-control" value="Target Joint Positions/Velocities" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer-gait" target="layer-state"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="580" y="320" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="360" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Layer: State Estimation --> <mxCell id="layer-state" value="State Estimation Layer (200 Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="360" width="920" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-state-estimator" value="State Estimator Node<br>(EKF/UKF + Kinematics)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="400" width="220" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-contact-detector" value="Contact Detector" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="400" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="label-phase1" value="Phase 1 (Priority)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#cc0000;fontStyle=3" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="400" width="400" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow: State to Safety and RT Control --> <mxCell id="arrow-state-to-safety" value="Robot State" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer-state" target="node-safety"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="350" y="460" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-state-to-rt" value="Robot State" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer-state" target="node-hardware"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="810" y="460" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="750" y="500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- RT Control and Safety Layer --> <mxCell id="layer-rt" value="Real-Time Control & Safety Layer (200 Hz, SCHED_FIFO)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="500" width="920" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-safety" value="Safety Monitor Node<br>(Fall Detection, Limits)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="540" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="node-hardware" value="robstride_hardware<br>(ros2_control HW Interface)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="540" width="220" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Safety to Hardware --> <mxCell id="arrow-safety-to-hw" value="Safety Signals / E-Stop" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#cc0000;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="node-safety" target="node-hardware"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow: Hardware to Motors --> <mxCell id="arrow-hw-to-motors" value="CAN Commands" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer-rt" target="layer-hardware"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="580" y="600" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="640" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Hardware Layer --> <mxCell id="layer-hardware" value="Hardware Layer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="640" width="920" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-motors" value="RobStride Motors<br>(RS02/RS05)<br>CAN Bus" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="680" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-imu" value="IMU Sensor<br>(200-1000 Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="680" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-force" value="Force Sensors<br>(Optional)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="680" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hw-encoders" value="Joint Encoders<br>(Built-in)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d4c5de;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="680" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Feedback arrows from hardware --> <mxCell id="arrow-feedback-motors" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hw-motors" target="layer-rt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-feedback-imu" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.4;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hw-imu" target="layer-rt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-feedback-force" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.6;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hw-force" target="layer-rt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-feedback-encoders" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hw-encoders" target="layer-rt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="label-feedback" value="Sensor Feedback" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="880" y="620" width="140" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Feedback loop from State to Gait --> <mxCell id="arrow-state-to-gait" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;strokeColor=#00aa00;" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer-state" target="layer-gait"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="80" y="410" /> <mxPoint x="80" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="label-state-feedback" value="Robot State Feedback" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#00aa00;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="330" width="50" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Legend --> <mxCell id="legend-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;align=left;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1100" y="80" width="220" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-title" value="実装フェーズ" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1110" y="90" width="200" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-phase1" value="Phase 1: 基盤ノード (Priority)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="130" width="180" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-phase2" value="Phase 2: 歩容生成" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="170" width="180" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="legend-phase3" value="Phase 3: 高レベル制御 (Future)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#dae8fc;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="210" width="180" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: Real-Time Control & Safety Layer (200 Hz, SCHED_FIFO)
